Growth Architecture 02

Phased
Growth Roadmap

A structured operating system for scaling from zero to multi-vertical platform — with clear milestones at every stage.

Phase 00
PRE-LAUNCH
30days
  • Build GHL snapshot end to end
  • Demo environment with sample data
  • Website + legal docs finalized
  • Onboarding SOP documented
  • 3 tiers and pricing locked in
Phase 01
FOUNDING CLIENTS
5clients
  • Close 5 Growth-tier contractors
  • Onboard end-to-end personally
  • Capture baseline metrics
  • Build 2 case studies in 30–45 days
  • Refine snapshot from real feedback
Phase 02
FIRST HIRE
$20-30KMRR
  • 15 paying clients live
  • Fulfillment hire handles onboarding
  • Churn under 5% monthly
  • 3–5 case studies + video testimonials
  • Track unit economics per tier
Phase 03
PRODUCTIZE
$50-70KMRR
  • 40 paying clients
  • Scale tier validated (5+ clients)
  • Net revenue retention >100%
  • Onboarding in 7 days or less
  • Full playbook library built
Phase 04
SCALE ENGINE
$120-200KMRR
  • 100 paying clients
  • Multiple acquisition channels live
  • Removed from all daily ops
  • Net margin 25–40%
  • Second vertical ready to launch
Phase 05
MULTI-VERTICAL
100+clients
  • Second vertical fully launched
  • Internal product team (1–2 people)
  • Proprietary AI agents per vertical
  • M&A optionality documented
  • Category brand in the market
